## [Outline]{style="display: block; text-align: center;"}
<!-- **Topic**: How should RL model and leverage imperfect human feedback to achieve *human-defined* objectives? -->
$$ $$
<div style="display: flex; gap: 1em; font-size: 0.8em;">
<div style="flex: 1; border-right: 2px solid #282626; padding-right: 1em;">

**Using Imperfect Human Feedback...**

<!-- Learning *ill-defined* rewards from humans -->

Highlight and validate the characteristics of human feedback in real human-robot systems.

</div>
<div style="flex: 1; padding-left: 1em;">

**...to Learn Reward Functions**

<!-- Model the imperfections in human feedback -->

Examine how human data is tractably used to synthesize rewards and robotic decision-making with ill-defined objectives.

</div>
</div>

Lastly, we'll examine open problems in the field along with a possible methodology.
